reversed-table.title: Reversed miRNA table
reversed-table.description: Full reversed-aggregated table: each miRNA with its target count and the list of mRNAs it targets.

filtered-table.title: Filtered miRNA table
filtered-table.description: miRNAs with target count <= count_threshold (the more specific miRNAs).

input-snapshot.title: Input snapshot
input-snapshot.description: Copy of the input CSV used for this run.

params-used.title: Parameters used
params-used.description: Snapshot of the parameters used for this run (Job ID, thresholds, versions, time).
